alerts.name: Stale Device Alert (30+ days)
alerts.description: Devices that have not synced with Intune in over 30 days
alerts.kql_query: IntuneManagedDevices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId | extend LastSyncDaysAgo = datetime_diff('day', now(), todatetime(LastSyncDateTime)) | where LastSyncDaysAgo > {threshold} | project DeviceId, DeviceName, UserPrincipalName, UserDisplayName, LastSyncDateTime, LastSyncDaysAgo, Model, OperatingSystem, ComplianceState, SerialNumber

auto_resolve.resolve_query: IntuneManagedDevices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId | extend LastSyncDaysAgo = datetime_diff('day', now(), todatetime(LastSyncDateTime)) | where LastSyncDaysAgo <= {threshold} | project DeviceId

alerts.name: Jacob Williams Device Alert
alerts.kql_query: IntuneManagedDevices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId | where UserPrincipalName == '{upn}' | project DeviceId, DeviceName, UserPrincipalName, UserDisplayName, LastSyncDateTime, Model, OperatingSystem, ComplianceState, SerialNumber, EnrolledDateTime
